category_sources: source_facts.description: conversion library; official GNU page describes GNU libiconv as a character encoding conversion library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU libiconv project page; official GNU page names the project libiconv.
docs_sources: Official GNU libiconv page has a Documentation section linking the program and library manuals.
repo_sources: Official GNU libiconv page says development sources are obtained through Savannah; GNU Savannah project hosts the official Git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says conversion library; official GNU page describes conversion between character encodings.
